data.acceptance:
- Beats remaining should be calculated accurately based on underlying beats' state
- When beats remaining is 0 for unselected set list, there should be a visual cue that the execution plan has no remaining work.  
- If the execution plan is not in terminal state , there should be a button you can click that completes the execution_plan workflow (whatever the postiive terminal state is)

to recreate and verify,  you can look at the foolery repo setlist screen using bun dev and localhost:<port>.  don't use port 3000.
